content_body:
Put your property under our care, and put your mind at ease. We'll ensure your second home stays in tip-top shape while you're away. Based in the Blue Ridge Mountains of North Georgia, we offer a variety of home care services so you can shorten your to-do list and get back to living.

 

Monthly Home Inspections

We'll conduct a thorough, room-by-room inspection each month to make sure your vacation home is well-maintained and secure. You will receive a detailed report via email noting any issues before they become larger problems.

 

Call (706) 632 - 2246 to receive a quote.

*Pricing varies based on square footage.

 

Interested in additional home care services? See what else we offer:
title: Reclaim Your Life!
